summaries.theme_name: App Performance and Customer Support Issues
actionable_ideas: Prioritize bug fixes and performance optimization to reduce glitches and improve user experience
Enhance customer support by providing timely and personalized responses to user queries and concerns
Simplify the IPO application process and ensure timely updates on application status

verbatim_quotes.quote: full of bugs update comes every day but still lagging
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: The app is full of glitches lately.Unable to withdraw and add money during market crashes
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: None of my last ten IPO applications were allotted. Not even a single IPO was allotted to me
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

actionable_ideas: Optimize the app for peak usage during market hours to prevent slow loading and crashes
Ensure that all time frames are available for charts, including lower time frames and 4hr chart data
Investigate and resolve the symbol error issue that prevents users from accessing chart data

verbatim_quotes.quote: such a waste user experience can't find 4hr chart data waste of time and energy snowing symbol error for a long time
